scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.resolve('statics');const dst=path.resolve('../../build-in/mcp/statics');fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dst),{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});" && npm run bundle
